member.name: M:CodeCompassProject.CodeCompass.Api.Controllers.ChatController.Chat(CodeCompassProject.CodeCompass.Application.DTOs.ChatRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a question to CodeCompass and receive a grounded answer with citations.
member.param: The chat request containing the user question.
member.returns: A grounded answer with citations from indexed documentation and code.

member.name: M:CodeCompassProject.CodeCompass.Api.Controllers.HealthController.GetHealth(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check the health of all CodeCompass services.

member.name: M:CodeCompassProject.CodeCompass.Api.Controllers.IngestController.IngestDocs(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFileCollection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ingest documentation files into the vector store.

member.name: M:CodeCompassProject.CodeCompass.Api.Controllers.IngestController.IngestCode(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFileCollection,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ingest source code files into the vector store.
member.param: Optional repository name for source tracking.

member.name: M:CodeCompassProject.CodeCompass.Api.Controllers.IngestController.IngestKnowledgeBase(CodeCompassProject.CodeCompass.Application.DTOs.IngestKnowledgeBaseRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Ingest a knowledge base directory into the Azure AI Search index via the RAG pipeline.
member.param: The ingestion request containing target path and indexing mode.
